title: erigeron vicinus
intro: Erigeron vicinus, also known as the related species to the Erigeron glabellus, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Erigeron vicinus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Erigeron vicinus typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
